MAX17048 DOKUMENTACJA

The MAX17048 operates with a single lithium cell.

The ICs automatically detect when the battery enters a
low-current state and enters low-power 3μA hibernate
mode, while still providing accurate fuel gauging. The
ICs automatically exit hibernate mode when the system
returns to active state.

VDD = 2.5V to 4.5V

CTG - GND
CELL - CONNECT TO +BATT
VDD - CONNECT TO +BATT
GND - GND

QSTRT - GND IF NOT USED
SCL - PULLUP TO MCU LOGIC V + CONN
SDA - PULLUP TO MCU LOGIC V + CONN

    TC            BAUD
    1             115200

    3             38400

    6             19200

    12            9600 
    24            4800 
    48            2400
